title: Domestic energy affordability support schemes: impact and economic evaluation
body: "The domestic energy affordability support schemes were implemented from the winter of 2022 to 2023 to support households during a period of exceptional energy price rises.  The schemes in scope of this evaluation, totalling £36.3 billion in spend, are the:   Energy Bills Support Scheme (EBSS)  EBSS Alternative Funding (EBSS AF) Energy Price Guarantee (EPG) Alternative Fuel Payment (AFP)  AFP Alternative Funding (AFP AF)   This report covers the impact and economic evaluations of the schemes. The earlier process and early outcomes evaluations are detailed in 2 separate reports for Great Britain and Northern Ireland.  See:   Domestic energy affordability support schemes in Great Britain: interim evaluation Domestic energy affordability support schemes in Northern Ireland: interim evaluation   The reports on the evaluation of the non-domestic schemes for businesses, voluntary and public sector organisations can be found at:   Non-domestic energy affordability support schemes: evaluation   "
